reasoning: Koneru Humpy's classical FIDE rating on the March 2026 ranking list is 2535. For her rating to be at least 1% higher on the April 2026 list (valid on 2026-04-05), she would need to gain more than 25.35 Elo points in a single month. For a top-level player (Elo >2400) with a K-factor of 10, a >25-point jump in one rating period is exceedingly rare, as it requires playing many games and scoring far above statistical expectation against highly rated opponents. Furthermore, news from late March 2026 confirms that Humpy withdrew from the Women's Candidates Tournament, which was the only major classical event she was scheduled to play during this rating period. Without playing any rated classical games in March, her rating will remain unchanged on the April 2026 list. Thus, the probability of her rating increasing by 1% is virtually zero.
